action.reasoning: Observation: Training fails repeatedly with ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (model.py/train.py/predict.py fully ready for XGBRegressor on Morgan FP r=3/2048bit with MAE objective, early_stopping=50 on val, n_est=1000, logging to metrics.jsonl, best.pkl save; best MAE still 0.2188 from RF, MLP 0.231). Iter_7 curve shows smooth loss drop. Analysis: xgboost not preinstalled but explicitly allowed via packages_to_install (persists); XGB with hist+MAE+early_stop expected to beat RF (~0.16-0.19 MAE) on sparse high-dim FP regression for QM9. FP calc time acceptable (~3-5min) with 1.8h/15 iters left. No code bugs. Decision: Install xgboost, run current train.py on full data to train+log+save, submit_eval on best.pkl for test score/timing before further opts (Mordred or GNN).
